历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, science category approximately 13,693th; in 2023, approximately 7,812th; in 2024, approximately 14,269th; in 2025, physics category approximately 11,746th. Over the past 4 years, there has been significant fluctuation, with a notable forward shift in ranking in 2023 (7,812th), a large backward shift to 14,269th in 2024, and a rebound to 11,746th in 2025, showing an overall oscillating trend. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 11,746th. The provincial science group plan had 51 students in 2022, 52 in 2023, 50 in 2024, and 59 (physics category) in 2025. The 2026 physics category plan is 61 students, a slight expansion of about 3.4% compared to 2025, with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Soft Science main ranking approximately 113th-115th, stable in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of agriculture and forestry universities. Reputation has been stable in recent years, with no major negative public incidents. Douyin popularity total ranking 59th, rated as 'relatively hot', with comprehensive popularity of about 543,000, attracting some attention on short video platforms. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. In the fourth round of discipline evaluation, Forestry Engineering A+, Landscape Architecture A+, Forestry A- are the university's traditional advantageous disciplines, corresponding to enrollment majors such as Forestry and Landscape Architecture.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, and the university's related majors have consistently high enrollment rankings. The total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is approximately 66,000, basically unchanged from 65,897 in 2025, so the scale of competition remains similar.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking fluctuations, a slight expansion of about 3.4% in the 2026 plan, a basically unchanged total number of candidates in the province, and stable university reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 11,746th, with a slight adjustment due to the expectation of slightly intensified competition after expansion, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 12,015th, with a range of 11,515th to 12,515th.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 11,515th), you can focus on reaching for popular engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electrical Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 12,515th), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety, while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors.
